iteration-bounds.principle: All loops and iterative processes MUST have explicit stop conditions

compaction-timing.principle: Compact context at phase boundaries, not arbitrary token thresholds

author-reviewer-separation.principle: Run reviews in a separate agent process from the implementer

retry-with-context.principle: Never blindly retry — capture error context and feed it forward

deterministic-over-probabilistic.principle: Prefer deterministic verification over LLM-as-judge for quality gates

hooks-vs-skills-enforcement.principle: Use hooks (100% reliable) not skills (~50-80%) for behaviors that must execute every time

hook-implementation.principle: Extract hook logic into external shell scripts to avoid JSON escape errors

llm-output-parsing.principle: Use multi-format regex + fail-closed defaults for LLM output parsing

llm-trust-boundaries.principle: Treat accumulated LLM memory as untrusted, same as external input

test-behavior-not-implementation.principle: Test behavior and observable outputs, not implementation internals

n-plus-1-prevention.principle: Batch-fetch related data, never query inside loops

knowledge-placement.principle: Append to existing skills over creating new files

prototype-before-scale.principle: Run small-scale trial before full execution to establish quality baselines
